hints: Past Continuous для фонової дії, Past Simple для короткої події.
Past Continuous описує дію в процесі; Past Simple — подію, що її перервала.
Фонова дія: were watching; коротка подія: went out.
Past Perfect показує дію, яка сталася раніше іншої минулої дії.
Before + later past action; earlier experience uses Past Perfect.
Past Simple для моменту прибуття; Past Continuous для ситуації, що вже тривала.
While часто з’єднує дві паралельні тривалі дії.
Past Perfect пояснює результат, який існував до моменту в історії.
Past Simple negative + Past Continuous for background state.
Причина сталася або не сталася до моменту в минулому → Past Perfect.
Past Simple negative + Past Continuous background.
Lost the key happened before the later action did not enter.
Question: Was/Were + subject + V-ing + when + Past Simple?
Question in Past Perfect: Had + subject + V3?
Main question in Past Simple; earlier action inside clause uses Past Perfect.
Past Continuous question for action in progress.
Wh-question with Past Continuous + interrupting Past Simple event.
Wh-question in Past Perfect.
Wh-question with Past Continuous for the action in progress.
After + Past Perfect can show the earlier action in a story.
The train left earlier; we reached the station later.
Reading was in progress; knocked is the interrupting event.
Past Perfect shows the earlier completed search.
Past Continuous for the background action; Past Simple for the event.
